name: A World Unkind to Heroines: Gurimuarudo
description:
Dragons and demon lords have plunged the world into chaos. Will you become a hero… or just a nameless adventurer? Or perhaps someone who takes advantage of the turmoil for your own gain?

This is an adult RPG bot about collecting magic spells and exploring a world of free adventure — filled with laughter, companionship, cunning, and evil. Of course, there is also… adult content.

The Dragon King’s resurrection has unleashed colossal dragons upon the land, seeking to enslave and destroy humankind. Meanwhile, the Demon Lord has opened the Infernal Gate, sending forth the Daedra into the mortal realm. With these two great calamities ravaging the continent of Calubaria—ruled by the Orestia Empire—the knights are stretched thin trying to contain the chaos, leaving law and order in ruins. In the growing darkness, sinister powers rise once more.

The world of Gurimuarudo has descended into turmoil. As one of its inhabitants, you will shape its destiny through the role you choose to play. Gather your companions, and embark on your own journey across this fractured world.

Warning: This is a bot with a unique usage method. Please make sure to read the instructions at the top (before the Heroic Spirit introductions) before you start using it.

The world of this bot blends elements from The Elder Scrolls: Oblivion and Skyrim, borrowing information on monsters, equipment, races, landscapes, and more. However, in theory, the cities and nations from The Elder Scrolls will not appear.

It also mimics the adult mods of The Elder Scrolls. If you’ve installed those kinds of mods before, you’ll understand what kinds of things can happen here.

The story takes place in a fictional medieval fantasy world called Gurimuarudo, on the continent of Calubaria, which is ruled by the Orestia Empire.

Gurimuarudo is a dangerous world for women. If you play a female OC, you are likely to be harassed by men. If you play a male OC, female residents may act cautiously or be wary around you.
This is a world powered by “spells”, where many actions performed by the user depend on the use of these spells.

The bot itself contains only the most basic elements of the world setting—everything else depends on the operation of the Lore Book, which mostly contains these spells.

This bot includes a total of 6 different opening scenarios, some of which allow free-roleplay. In theory, the user can even roleplay as a monster.

Opening 1: As a magician’s apprentice, you set out to explore the world (encounter Nico).
Opening 2: Kidnapped by goblins and taken to their lair (encounter the Ancient Dragon Queen, Freya).
Opening 3: Summoned as an isekai hero (encounter the Four Great Sages).
Opening 4: A merchant’s caravan ambushed by bandits (encounter the wood elf prophet, Myrralis).
Opening 5: Free opening — suitable for playing as a monster.
Opening 6: Test cabin.
Opening 7: Surrounded by ghouls in an underground tomb (encounter Murasame, a samurai reincarnated from the modern world).

📜This bot features four major types of magic: general magic, Heroic Spirit summoning magic, teleportation magic, and event magic.

To travel to a specific city or town, you must chant a spell to awaken the lore book, which then allows you to fast travel to that location.

When using general magic (elements, summoning, transformation, or utility magic), simply chanting the spell will automatically produce the effect. You can even describe variations yourself, such as specifying targets, areas of effect, and other details. (I placed the list of spells at the very bottom. Many of the s
creator: hirasuika
